message:
feat(server): instrument HTTP handler and tool calls with global metrics

Add InflightGuard RAII wrapper tracking HTTP requests-in-flight via
global_metrics().http. Record HTTP status codes and latency on every
response. Switch InstrumentedTool from String-based tool name to
pre-resolved tool_index for lock-free metric recording with per-call
latency in microseconds. Conditionally gate request-log string
allocation behind needs_request_log to avoid overhead when neither
request logging nor dashboard is enabled. Register new
ToolingMetricsCoreResource endpoints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
